---
title: "Data Wrangling"
author: "Maeve Gualtieri-Reed"
date: "2026-03-29"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Setup
```{r}
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
library(cowplot)
```


# Load in data set

```{r}
load <- read_excel("load.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(daily = rowMeans(across(3:26), na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(date = ymd(date)) %>% 
  select(date,daily)
```

## check for missing data

```{r}
summary(load$daily) #no NA

check_nobs <- length(seq.Date(
  from = as.Date("2005-01-01"),
  to   = as.Date("2011-06-30"),
  by   = "day"
))

nobs <- nrow(load)
#number of expected observations = number of actual observations no missing data
```

## Create time series object

```{r}
ts_load <- msts(load$daily, 
                seasonal.periods =c(7,365.25), #7 = weekly, 365.25 = yearly 
                start=c(2005,1,1))
```

#Examine data

```{r}
autoplot(ts_load)
```
